title: anthurium atropurpureum var. arenicola
intro: Anthurium atropurpureum var. arenicola, also known as the terrestrial anthurium, is a species of flowering plant in the Arum family, native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its potential to treat skin irritations and wounds due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Anthurium atropurpureum var. arenicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used in topical applications to soothe and treat skin conditions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to aid in the treatment of various health issues.
